title: ProbBrain Subscriber
description: Schema for a single subscriber entry in subscribers.json

subscriber_id.description: Telegram user ID (numeric string) or handle

drip_day.description: Which drip message they are currently on

last_message_at.description: ISO8601 — timestamp of last message sent. Null if never messaged.

messages_sent.description: Total messages sent to this subscriber

resolved_signals_seen.description: Count of resolved signals this subscriber has received

correct_signals_seen.description: Count of correct resolved signals — gate for Day 14 upsell (requires >= 3)

status.description: active = normal, re_engagement_sent = one check-in sent, no follow-up allowed

last_engagement_at.description: ISO8601 — last time subscriber clicked, replied, or interacted

pro_upsell_sent_at.description: ISO8601 — when Day 14 upsell was last sent. Max 1 per month per subscriber.

re_engagement_sent_at.description: ISO8601 — when re-engagement message was sent. Once set, never follow up.
